action.reasoning: Observation: 4-model ensemble with new strong m2.pt (val 0.851, LA_TAU=1.2) achieved 0.8658, a new best. Few-shot improved to 0.8097. Analysis: ~2.35h, 7 iters left. The stronger LA_TAU=1.2 helped. Could try training one more diverse model with even higher LA_TAU or different seed, replacing the weaker m3 (val 0.844). Training takes ~230s. Decision: Train a 5th model with seed=2024, LA_TAU=1.2, save as m3.pt (overwriting weaker one). Then ensemble all 4 again.
action.command: SEED=2024 LA_TAU=1.2 SAVE_NAME=tmp_m.pt EMA_SAVE_NAME=m3.pt EPOCHS=18 python train2.py
